2604.06711.title: Specializing Large Models for Oracle Bone Script Interpretation via Component-Grounded Multimodal Knowledge Augmentation
2604.06711.paper_summary: Deciphering ancient Chinese Oracle Bone Script (OBS) is a challenging task that offers insights into the beliefs, systems, and culture of the ancient era. Existing approaches treat decipherment as a closed-set image recognition problem, which fails to bridge the ``interpretation gap'': while individual characters are often unique and rare, they are composed of a limited set of recurring, pictographic components that carry transferable semantic meanings. To leverage this structural logic, we propose an agent-driven Vision-Language Model (VLM) framework that integrates a VLM for precise visual grounding with an LLM-based agent to automate a reasoning chain of component identification, graph-based knowledge retrieval, and relationship inference for linguistically accurate interpretation. To support this, we also introduce OB-Radix, an expert-annotated dataset providing structural and semantic data absent from prior corpora, comprising 1,022 character images (934 unique characters) and 1,853 fine-grained component images across 478 distinct components with verified explanations. By evaluating our system across three benchmarks of different tasks, we demonstrate that our framework yields more detailed and precise decipherments compared to baseline methods.
2604.06711.paper_summary_zh: 解讀古代中國甲骨文（OBS）是一項具有挑戰性的任務，能提供對古代信仰、系統和文化的深入了解。現有的方法將解讀視為一個封閉集的圖像識別問題，這無法彌補“解釋差距”：雖然單個字元通常是獨特且稀有的，但它們是由一組有限的重複圖像組件組成，這些組件承載著可轉移的語義意義。為了利用這一結構邏輯，我們提出了一種基於代理的視覺-語言模型（VLM）框架，該框架將精確的視覺定位的VLM與基於LLM的代理整合，以自動化組件識別、基於圖的知識檢索和關係推理的推理鏈，以實現語言上準確的解釋。為了支持這一點，我們還推出了OB-Radix，一個專家標註的數據集，提供了先前語料庫中缺失的結構和語義數據，包括1,022個字元圖像（934個獨特字元）和478個不同組件中的1,853個細粒度組件圖像，並附有經過驗證的解釋。通過在三個不同任務的基準上評估我們的系統，我們證明了我們的框架相比基線方法能產生更詳細和精確的解讀。
2604.06711.author: Jianing Zhang et.al.
2604.06711.authors: Jianing Zhang, Runan Li, Honglin Pang, Ding Xia, Zhou Zhu, Qian Zhang, Chuntao Li, Xi Yang
